programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Female-led crime drama series. In the series finale, the story of Joe Bevan and his house of horrors takes another twist as DCI Gill Murray is kidnapped by someone heavily involved in the case. Their friendship in tatters, DCs Scott and Bailey are forced to pull together in order to save their boss but face a desperate race against time as Gill is taken to Flamborough Head on the east coast, a beautiful clifftop spot notorious for suicides.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Police drama series. Battle-scarred from their conflict during the last series, Rachel and Janet are determined to move forward. Rachel aims to give her career her best shot and not be bogged down by the chaos of her personal life, while Janet wants the opportunities that she feels she deserves. Scott and Bailey find themselves in front of the promotions board being interviewed for the post of sergeant; when both pass with flying colours, DCI Gill Murray has to choose which of them gets the job at Syndicate Nine. Meanwhile, the team's latest case involves the abduction and possible murder of vulnerable young man Robin McKendrick. When a photo of Robin gagged and bound in the boot of a car appears on Facebook, Syndicate Nine suspect that he is already dead. A lead takes the team to a local quarry where they expect to find Robin's remains, but when the divers are called in, the body they find is that of a young woman...

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Stan and Jack tease Inspector Blake when they are amused at the attention showered on new canteen girl Molly by their superior.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: When a well-known business tycoon is murdered at his country mansion, his feuding sons and unstable wife immediately fall under suspicion - meanwhile, Morse clashes with a new chief superintendent and becomes the unwitting victim of a hate campaign in the tabloid press.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: PC Mike Bradley investigates a mysterious case of food poisoning after a neighbourly dispute. Greengrass recovers a debt and finds himself the owner of a python.

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama. When a young female member of a New Age cult called the Oblong Foundation goes missing, DCI John Barnaby investigates and sends DS Jones undercover at the cult's base of Malham Hall - the police learn that the hall's previous owners, Jeremy and Carolyn Lambert, died in a gas explosion on board their boat. At the local pub, Barnaby hears various conspiracy theories about how the Lamberts met their death - their lawyer reveals that her clients withdrew thousands of pounds from their account supposedly for gambling and also gave them advice about the use of a promissory note. While Barnaby tries to find out who might have borrowed money from the Lamberts, another cult member dies suspiciously - the police uncover existence of a promissory note and discover that the man who witnessed it died the same night as the Lamberts. Can Barnaby and Jones find out who killed the owners of Malham Hall and if the case has a link to the missing woman?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lily sees a way to save Peter from his financial worries when the factory's raffle syndicate win a car. Jamie asks Bob to put a stop to his risky attempts to see Viv.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. Syndicate Nine's new sergeant is thrown in at the deep end with a historic missing persons case when Mandy Sweeting's body is discovered 23 years after she disappeared. The biggest challenge is wading through poor police work that hampered the original case and re-interviewing bruised and bereft family members, making this a particularly challenging job for the new sergeant. Meanwhile, Janet keeps Gill's secret but shares another secret with Rachel - she wants a boyfriend.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey

programme.title: No Room For Error
programme.desc: The island is drenched in sun and there's a crackle of anticipation as the cream of the road racing crop eagerly await a TT like none before - there are newcomer nerves alongside shock and awe as Michael Dunlop leaves jaws on the floor with a stunning opening lap to set the tone for a record-breaking fortnight at the 2023 event.

programme.title: Die Another Day
programme.desc: The 20th entry in the James Bond film series and Pierce Brosnan's final appearance as the secret agent. 007 is assigned to North Korea on a mission to assassinate a colonel when he is betrayed by a double agent at MI6 and captured - after enduring 14 months of torture, James is traded at the Korean border for Zao, a North Korean agent and associate of the colonel, in a prisoner exchange. Bond then escapes his subsequent MI6 detention and tracks Zao to Havana where he meets NSA agent Jinx and learns that she is working on the same case - James soon discovers that Zao is in league with the British diamond and technology tycoon Sir Gustav Graves... and that the two are planning to use a new satellite called Icarus to change the power balance of the world permanently.

programme.title: The Frozen Ground
programme.desc: A teenage escapee provides a critical break in the case, as an Alaskan detective hunts a serial killer who has been preying on women for 13 years.

programme.title: Desperation Road
programme.desc: A woman and her young daughter get caught in the crossfire when whiskey, guns and the desire for revenge violently intersect in a rough-and-tumble Mississippi town.

programme.title: Silent Night
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a man witnesses the death of his young son when the boy gets caught in crossfire between warring gangs. Recovering from a wound that cost him his voice, he soon embarks on a bloody and grueling quest to punish those responsible.

programme.title: Killshot
programme.desc: A veteran assassin (Mickey Rourke) and his young partner (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) pursue a couple (Diane Lane, Thomas Jane) who stumbled upon an extortion scheme and entered the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: A prosecutor (Dominic Cooper) commits a fatal hit-and-run, then manipulates the case so that the man who was arrested for the crime is acquitted. After the trial, he discovers that his actions have freed a guilty man.

programme.title: Jason Bourne

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings new devastation to an already scorched landscape. With no military intervention or government help in sight, the survivors must join together in the face of despair and fight back against an unrelenting horror.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: Gerard Butler and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau star as rival gods locked in an epic battle to decide the fate of the universe in this thrilling fantasy-adventure.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: Gerard Butler dan Nikolaj Coster-Waldau berperan sebagai dua dewa yang berseteru, Set dan Horus. Guna mengalahkan Set yang kejam, Horus bekerjasama dengan seorang pemuda pemberani untuk menyelamatkan umat manusia.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Para prajurit yang terbunuh saat bertugas dihidupkan kembali melalui eksperimen militer rahasia yang menciptakan prajurit super.

programme.title: Blood On The Crown
programme.desc: Citizens fighting for independence from Britain were met by an Army-quelled bloody riot that the government covered up. Over 100 Maltese were falsely jailed for instigating the violence.

programme.title: Blood On The Crown
programme.desc: Tepat setelah Perang Dunia I pada tahun 1919, warga Malta bangkit untuk mencari kemerdekaan dari pemerintahan Inggris, tetapi tentara menumpas kerusuhan tersebut, pemerintah menutupi pertumpahan darah, dan lebih dari 100 warga Malta dipenjara.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2 (Rock Action)

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's 8th film takes place in wintry Wyoming, where eight strangers, including two bounty hunters and a wanted fugitive, find themselves battling the elements and each other.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Di tengah musim dingin Wyoming yang mencekam, seorang pemburu hadiah dan tahanannya menemukan tempat berlindung di sebuah pondok yang saat itu dihuni oleh sekelompok karakter jahat.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen has returned home safe after winning the 74th Annual Hunger Games. She senses that a rebellion is simmering, but the Capitol is still very much in control as the next Hunger Games is prepared—a competition that could change Panem forever.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen dan Peeta Mellark menjadi target Capitol setelah kemenangan mereka dalam Hunger Games ke-74 memicu pemberontakan di Distrik Panem.

programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Di tengah musim dingin Wyoming yang mencekam, seorang pemburu hadiah dan tahanannya menemukan tempat berlindung di sebuah pondok yang saat itu dihuni oleh sekelompok karakter jahat.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 1
programme.desc: Tsunami menghancurkan Waikiki dan memicu bencana berantai. Gunung berapi meletus, air mendidih muncul dari bumi, Hoover Dam runtuh, hingga Mount Rushmore meledak oleh lava.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 2
programme.desc: Hotel-hotel di Las Vegas telah ambruk ke dalam tanah, Dr. Hill dan para penyintas yang tersisa berpacu untuk melarikan diri. Sementara itu, gempa bumi dahsyat mengancam akan membelah Amerika Utara menjadi dua dan pembangkit listrik tenaga nuklir berada tepat di jalurnya.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club

programme.title: Kingmaker
programme.desc: Film ini didasarkan pada kisah anekdotal tentang hubungan kerja antara Kim Dae-jung dan ahli strategi politiknya, Uhm Chang-rok. Seo Chang-dae adalah seorang ahli strategi politik yang mengutamakan kemenangan di atas segalanya, sedangkan Kim Woon-beom adalah seorang politisi dengan ambisi menjadi presiden terkemuka. Namun, konflik internal dalam kampanye muncul saat Seo Chang Dae mendesak Kim Woon Bum untuk melakukan beberapa taktik curang.

programme.title: The Whistleblower
programme.desc: Sebuah drama berdasarkan pengalaman Kathryn Bolkovac, seorang polisi Nebraska yang bertugas sebagai penjaga perdamaian di Bosnia pascaperang dan keluar dari PBB karena menutupi skandal perdagangan seks.

programme.title: Decibel
programme.desc: Seorang mantan komandan angkatan laut menerima panggilan telepon dari pria tak dikenal yang menyatakan telah memasang bom di lokasi yang dipenuhi orang. Bom tersebut adalah "bom suara" yang akan meledak saat suara sekitar melebihi 100 desibel. Mantan komandan angkatan laut pun berusaha mati-matian menghentikan serangan teror tersebut.

programme.title: The Moon
programme.desc: Seorang astronaut terdampar di luar angkasa karena sebuah kecelakaan saat melakukan penerbangan luar angkasa. Mantan direktur pusat antariksa pun berusaha keras untuk membawanya kembali ke bumi dengan selamat.

programme.title: The Unfair
programme.desc: Sebuah protes menentang pembaharuan kota berujung pada kematian seorang polisi dan seorang remaja. Ayah remaja itu ditangkap atas kematian polisi tersebut. Seorang pengacara muda pun ditugaskan untuk membelanya.

programme.title: You Will Die In 6 Hours
programme.desc: Jun Woo memperingatkan Jeong Yun tentang pembunuhan yang akan menimpanya. Dengan rasa skeptis, ia mulai menyelidiki dan menemukan keterkaitan Jun Woo dengan serangkaian pembunuhan. Ia pun berpacu dengan waktu untuk mengetahui apakah Jun Woo melindunginya atau justru menipunya sebelum kematian yang telah diramalkan itu terjadi.

programme.title: Vivo
programme.desc: Vivo, a one-of-a-kind capuchin monkey, must find his way from Havana to Miami in order to deliver a song on behalf of his beloved owner and mentor, Andrés.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: Rare vehicles are like winning the lottery for every car spotter. With 20 units built, the Pagani Huayra BC is one of the most exclusive vehicles in the automotive world. Its counterpart: the Rimac Concept One, which makes history as the fastest e-car in the world with a top speed of 355 km/h. Lamborghini Huracan O.CT and Arden Jaguar F-Type promise brutal tuning power beyond good and evil. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: We are looking for the king of off-road pickups! The off-road specialists from Delta 4x4 convert the VW Amarok into a beast. Off-road, he challenges Toyota off-road expert Alexander Wohlfarth to a duel in his Toyota Hilux. Who performs better off-road and at the same time still has enough suitability for everyday use? (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In 2019, Porsche celebrated 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993 based on an existing original bodyshell - the unique "Project Gold". Also: the Q5 Sportback, Audi's mid-range SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Danger in your neck and still in a good mood? No problem for the full professionals at Action Concept. Spectacular stunts are her job – and her passion! Explosions, flights, jumps, breathtaking images and exciting behind-the-scene stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Maybach – the finest car manufacturer from Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. An outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship. A Maybach is considered the measure of all things modern automotive technology. These vehicles were forgotten for over 60 years - until Mercedes-Benz revived the luxury brand in 2002. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good condition, others a little polished, the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Classic motorcycles are back in fashion. Honda is also reflecting on its great tradition and with the CB 1100 EX has revived a big bike that could have ridden on our streets in the flashy seventies. Nostalgic spoke wheels complete the design of the elegant four-cylinder bike with sufficient 94 hp power, more than enough for a relaxed cruise into the sunset. How does the CB 1100 EX compare to rivals like the BMW R nineT? The Japanese classic in the MOTORVISION TV driving test. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Porsche now offers 27 derivatives of its cult model 911. The selection has never been so large. And it has never been possible to examine all models in one place until today! We are literally speed dating with the Porsche 911. Which variant can win the heart of Motorvision presenter Julian on a road trip through the Black Forest and the Palatinate and why? (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Elegant, powerful, fast: BMW CS and Mercedes SLC were already part of the crème de la crème of automobile construction in their time in series production. Alpina and AMG, two tuners and refiners of the first hour, get even more out of them. Plus: The rally legend Lancia Delta Integrale is idolized for its racing successes and decried for its unreliability. The track test shows: cult or junk? (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are wild, they are bursting with power and they are cult, the American muscle cars. Whether it's a Ford Mustang, a Chevrolet Camaro or a Corvette, muscle cars are coveted around the world for their rebellious designs, their outrageous horsepower and their breathtaking speeds. Dream Cars presents the most spectacular and fastest US sports and muscle cars. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Prince Leopold of Bavaria owns two cars that couldn't be more opposite: the BMW Isetta and the BMW Z8. The BMW Isetta is one of the strangest and most successful small cars of the 1950s, designed like an egg on wheels, with a 250cc motorcycle engine and 12 hp. The BMW Z8 is still a dream car today, timeless lines, 5-liter displacement and 400 hp. Classic Rides accompanies Leopold von Bayern as he gets both cars fit for the summer. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. Today in Adventure 4WD: Fata Morgana ahead! At the finale of the Nissan Four-by-Four Challenge, only victory counts! (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: There are cars to rave about and float around: the goddess, the duck and the gangster limousine. From the very beginning, Citroen has celebrated the joy of extravagance. The Traction Avant, called the gangster limousine, is a milestone in automotive history. The 2CV, called Duck, is the most unusual and charming car ever built. It quickly becomes a cult vehicle for students, professors and bon vivants. The DS19, the goddess, looks like she comes from another planet. With the hydropneumatic suspension, it puts its passengers in a state of suspension. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electrifying innovations and autonomous wonders: the future of driving is more refreshing than ever! For example with the Ora Funky Cat. A charming electric vehicle from China with a few special features. And the Audi Activesphere Concept shows what the next generation of the automobile looks like. Here the boundary between reality and the virtual world is erased. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In today's episode Perfect Ride: The 911 Porsche. Modern design, advanced technology, everything new and yet: unmistakably the same for 50 years. We are also testing the world's first standard plug-in hybrid with a diesel engine: the Volvo V60! (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: The ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season (channel info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: BTRDA Rallycross 2025
programme.desc: The races of the British Trial and Rally Drivers Association, which was founded in 1938, are highly competitive. The rallycross track with changing surfaces challenges the best drivers in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: At the start of the TT 2025, we take a look at the first qualifying sessions and look forward to Lee Johnston as co-commentator (channel info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025
Red Bull Romaniacs
programme.desc: The Romaniacs have become a permanent highlight in the hard enduro community's calendar. After some riders were denied the meeting last year, it was now even more beautiful in Sibiu. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: At the Retro Classics in Stuttgart, presenter Martin Utberg is one of the crowd pullers at the trade fair with his daily stage talks in Hall 10. He welcomes two prominent guests per day in front of a large live audience and talks to them about motorsport, personal experiences and the fascination of classic automobiles. In part 2, Martin speaks to several guests. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Prince Leopold of Bavaria owns two cars that couldn't be more opposite: the BMW Isetta and the BMW Z8. The BMW Isetta is one of the strangest and most successful small cars of the 1950s, designed like an egg on wheels, with a 250cc motorcycle engine and 12 hp. The BMW Z8 is still a dream car today, timeless lines, 5-liter displacement and 400 hp. Classic Rides accompanies Leopold von Bayern as he gets both cars fit for the summer. (Station info).

A charming electric vehicle from China with a few special features. And the Audi Activesphere Concept shows what the next generation of the automobile looks like. programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: Whether it's the tallest building, the tallest hotel or the most expensive police cars in the world: everything in Dubai is more exclusive, more expensive and bigger. MOTORVISION.TV - #SPOTTED follows the Dubai Police on one of their daily missions and presents the supercars of the most exciting fleet in the world. In contrast to this is the Polaris Slingshot - half car, half motorcycle and without any luxury. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: The SUV boom doesn't stop. Manufacturers are pushing one model after another onto the market. But what actually defines which SUV? With the X2, BMW wants to put a hipster on the road for young people. The DS 7 Crossback is intended to convey a French attitude to life. And Jaguar is bringing the E-Pace, a smaller version of the F-Pace. Motorvision TV looks for the differences. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: How do stunts work? What exactly does a stuntman do? Who are the real heroes of action films? The unique series “Stunt Heroes” on MotorvisionTV has been answering these and other questions for two years. The stunt people from Action Concept, one of the largest film and stunt productions in Europe, give a unique insight into their daily work and into what cannot be seen in the film. Weeks of preparation are often necessary for a 5-second film stunt. Backbreaking work! (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Motorcycling – a hobby or sport with an adrenaline rush, but also with risk. The fact that the number of deaths in motorcycle accidents in Germany is falling is due, among other things, to the constant improvement of crash helmets. The helmet manufacturer Schuberth in Magdeburg plays a large part in these life-saving developments. Around 350 employees manufacture all kinds of protective helmets here. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Assistance systems that are normal in cars usually seem exotic or even unthinkable on two-wheelers. However, this no longer applies to the blind spot warning system, which BMW is now offering for the first time. Ideal for the dense traffic in big cities, the home territory of the new maxi scooter C 650 GT. We test the new 60 hp large scooter including the assistance system in Valencia and find out in heavy rush hour traffic whether Side View Assist is an annoying paternalism - or perhaps a real help that could soon also come to motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: English luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler. In the Mercedes CLE 53, however, the best place is behind the steering wheel. Mercedes wants to arouse emotions again with a 3-liter in-line six-cylinder engine. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: The Reliant Scimitar is virtually unknown in Germany, but in England it was a car with a kind of cult status just a few decades ago. This is probably why the British royal family used this vehicle as a means of transport for many years. Classic introduces the exotic. Plus: a transport wonder on three wheels. The Moto Guzzi Hercules saves many a small farmer. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are spectacular and environmentally friendly, the most extravagant and fastest electric and hybrid cars in the world: whether Tesla, McLaren P1, Ferrari La Ferrari or Renovo Coupe, the battery- and hybrid-powered cars impress not only with their fascinating design, but also with intelligent technology, breathtaking acceleration and unique dynamics. Dream Cars presents the most exciting e-cars in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.sub-title: Classics on the way to auction
programme.desc: In this episode of Top Speed, presenter Martin Utberg visits the vintage car gallery in Toffen, Switzerland. It has been a permanent address for lovers of classic automobiles for over four decades and is known for its regular vintage car auctions. Together with auctioneer Serge Stotzer and his team, Martin takes a look behind the scenes of the preparations for the next auction. Some of the vehicles that will go under the hammer on Saturday, March 21st will be presented in more detail - and Martin will also get behind the wheel himself to experience these classics on the road. An exciting preview (channel information).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It's the little man's Ferrari - the Fiat Dino Spider. For many it is the most beautiful Fiat ever built. There's actually a Ferrari engine working under the hood and it's making a lot of steam. Michael Mandat's Fiat Dino was actually not for sale. But he hardly has any time left to drive the Dino and now wants to get rid of the convertible. At Classic Rides we will show you how the owner prepares his car for sale and whether the prospective buyer will actually take the Fiat Dino with them. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. Today in Adventure Allrad: Uwe Zirbes gets his new baby. Also a crazy test: Lamborghini Reventon or jet: who takes off earlier? And Adventure Allrad pits a Toyota against the Hummer H3. Which of the two off-road monsters performs better in the endurance test? In today's off-road tip you will learn everything about the ramp angle and its pitfalls. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the car of reason, it is not exciting, but it is the mega seller: the VW Golf, the most successful car in Europe, sold 30 million times. The Golf is mass compatible, classless and it dominates the compact car class. Because of its success, it has long been called the golf class. The models from the I series have long been cult, especially the legendary Golf Gti and the Golf convertible. Car History tells the story of the Golf generation and explains the secret of its success. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Price drop and range revolution. Electric cars overcome old prejudices. The Dacia Spring is one of the cheapest electric cars on the market. A real bargain or are there hidden catches? Volvo's answer to Tesla & Co. The new XC 40 comes with an extended range. How effective is it on a mountain road trip? (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Power Fighter, New Highway, or Low Rider Muscle: Aggressively unusual names for unusual vehicles. In a tranquil Bavarian village, the company Boom Trikes Fahrzeugbau GmbH assembles the coolest tricycles in the republic. With the quality seal "Made in Germany", the small company has developed into Europe's leading trike manufacturer in just under 25 years. (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: The ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season (channel info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025
Red Bull Romaniacs
programme.desc: The Romaniacs have become a permanent highlight in the hard enduro community's calendar. After some riders were denied the meeting last year, it was now even more beautiful in Sibiu. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Gearing Up 2026
programme.desc: Pure passion for racing, extraordinary talent and thrills right up to the last second - that's what this magazine promises, reporting on the most exciting motorsport events. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Robust and popular - these are the keywords for these models. Subaru has renamed the XV. Completely renovated and with the new name Cros-strek, the SUV is now looking for customers. We reveal what's behind it. And Cupra is giving its bestseller Formentor an update that is particularly causing a visual sensation. We explain why. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electric cars can't be sporty? But at least with the right boost. The Alpine A290 is intended to bring the brand's racing DNA into the electric age. We'll check whether it works and shed light on the French manufacturer's legendary rally history. And the VW ID.4 GTX shows that electric SUVs can be more than just family cars. We reveal 5 exciting facts. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.sub-title: Classics on the way to auction
programme.desc: In this episode of Top Speed, presenter Martin Utberg visits the vintage car gallery in Toffen, Switzerland. It has been a permanent address for lovers of classic automobiles for over four decades and is known for its regular vintage car auctions. Together with auctioneer Serge Stotzer and his team, Martin takes a look behind the scenes of the preparations for the next auction. Some of the vehicles that will go under the hammer on Saturday, March 21st will be presented in more detail - and Martin will also get behind the wheel himself to experience these classics on the road. An exciting preview (channel information).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It's the little man's Ferrari - the Fiat Dino Spider. For many it is the most beautiful Fiat ever built. There's actually a Ferrari engine working under the hood and it's making a lot of steam. Michael Mandat's Fiat Dino was actually not for sale. But he hardly has any time left to drive the Dino and now wants to get rid of the convertible. At Classic Rides we will show you how the owner prepares his car for sale and whether the prospective buyer will actually take the Fiat Dino with them. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. Today in Adventure Allrad: Uwe Zirbes gets his new baby. Also a crazy test: Lamborghini Reventon or jet: who takes off earlier? And Adventure Allrad pits a Toyota against the Hummer H3. Which of the two off-road monsters performs better in the endurance test? In today's off-road tip you will learn everything about the ramp angle and its pitfalls. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the car of reason, it is not exciting, but it is the mega seller: the VW Golf, the most successful car in Europe, sold 30 million times. The Golf is mass compatible, classless and it dominates the compact car class. Because of its success, it has long been called the golf class. The models from the I series have long been cult, especially the legendary Golf Gti and the Golf convertible. Car History tells the story of the Golf generation and explains the secret of its success. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Price drop and range revolution. Electric cars overcome old prejudices. The Dacia Spring is one of the cheapest electric cars on the market. A real bargain or are there hidden catches? Volvo's answer to Tesla & Co. The new XC 40 comes with an extended range. How effective is it on a mountain road trip? (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Power Fighter, New Highway, or Low Rider Muscle: Aggressively unusual names for unusual vehicles. In a tranquil Bavarian village, the company Boom Trikes Fahrzeugbau GmbH assembles the coolest tricycles in the republic. With the quality seal "Made in Germany", the small company has developed into Europe's leading trike manufacturer in just under 25 years. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: Cross is more possible – racing driver Tim Schrick and drift professional Werner Gusenbauer reveal their tricks. The legendary Subaru WRX STI on a drift mission in wintry Austria. Also: The Volvo XC40 becomes a stunt partner. Will the spectacular self-experiment with the Swede and a snowboard succeed? And: The Porsche Cayenne Turbo. The supposedly sportiest full-size SUV in the world tested in Crete. (Station info).

programme.title: NASCAR University
programme.desc: Martin Truex Jr. is now one of the most famous personalities in the NASCAR world and for good reason: in 2017, the driver of the #78 won the Monster Energy NASCAR Cup Series. However, the path to becoming a NASCAR champion was not always easy and required a lot of strength and endurance from him. NASCAR University looks at the career of Martin Truex Jr. with all successes and defeats. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: There are SUV models that have proven themselves, such as the Range Rover. The British manufacturer is building on this and is launching a small Rangy with the Velar in order to appeal to even more customers. In addition to Range Rover-typical luxury, the Velar should particularly score points with its chic look. Jeep relies on the tried and tested: The design of the Wrangler has remained almost the same for over 60 years. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: The Nürburgring race track in the Eifel has lost none of its appeal for decades. The oldie and youngtimer scene is also addicted to the black Eifel asphalt. This speed drug breathes new life into the gray panthers and ensures pure racing action. Today is race day in the Eifel: over 100 racing oldies are on the traditional route. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: A new test for the stunt people from Action Concept. They are supposed to create a spectacular motorcycle flight followed by a crash in a car. That would be far too dangerous even for a stuntman. That's why stunt coordinator Ramazan Bulut comes up with something and builds a cannon to shoot the motorcycle. But does it have enough power to throw the motorcycle quickly and sufficiently far into the air? The result surprises even our hardened stunt heroes! An exciting report from the world of film stunt people. (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: An inconspicuous industrial building in Regensburg, Bavaria. The most innovative German bicycle manufacturer is currently based here: PG Bikes. The Regensburg-based company develops and produces electric bikes with a retro look. The boss and idea generator of PG Bikes is 33-year-old Manuel Ostner. After owning his own scooter workshop, he began pimping up bicycles and eventually producing e-bikes. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: For the first time in its glorious and long history, the traditional Italian brand Ducati is venturing into the cruiser segment. With a long and flat silhouette and forward footrests for comfortable gliding, the 156 hp The new Duc is supposed to conquer the US market and beat Harley-Davidson not only with its own weapons, but with completely new weapons. MOTORVISION TV tested the new XDiavel in San Diego on classic cruiser terrain. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is the vision of an electric future from AMG: The Concept AMG GT XX delivers an incredible 1360 hp and charges faster than you can say range anxiety. We were there for the spectacular world premiere. And: This racer looks like it came out of a retro film but is the brand new top model from Morgan. We reveal five exciting facts about this British work of art. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. The most beautiful oldies, the hottest racing cars from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They guarantee an exclusive appearance and stand for status, prestige and perfection more than any other vehicle, the international limousines from Rolls Royce, Bentley, Mercedes, BMW and Jaguar. They are the crowning achievement of global automotive creation and define the standard of grandiose luxury and elegant comfort. Dream Cars presents the most expensive, luxurious and exclusive limousines in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is celebrating a special anniversary. In this issue we look back at 250 episodes that we produced in German for Motorvision. Moderator Martin Utberg shows the most beautiful moments, special encounters and unforgettable vehicles from the past few years - told personally and to the point. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: lassic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: A special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Nobody is faster, nobody is more reliable, nobody is more successful. Whether Le Mans, the Monte Carlo Rally or Formula 1: There is no race or rally that Porsche has not won, 28,000 times in 65 years. World record. Porsche wins a race with the first prototype, unforgettable the successes of the James Dean sypder at the Carrera Panamericana or the Targa Florio. In 1970 the first Le Mans victory with the 'monster', the Porsche 917. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Compact, modern, electric! E-SUVs are conquering our big cities. Volvo is sending the EX30 to attract customers. The brand's new smallest model is supposed to impress with Swedish coolness and plenty of power. The Renault Scenic E-Tech is half a size larger. After many successful years of the combustion engine variant, the French are giving the minivan batteries and an SUV silhouette. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Cars look impressive on the outside - no one hides their sporting ambitions. At the Ford Focus ST 5 tournament, it quickly becomes clear through spoilers, wide tires, painted brake calipers, ST logos, but above all through the centrally placed exhaust pipe and the exciting engine sound that the family is not supposed to travel with this car, but that dad wants to go on the motorway on Sunday - and alone! (Station info).

programme.desc: The ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: In the motherland of the V8, the craziest car show in the world is celebrated every year in Las Vegas. At Sema, manufacturers, tuners and customers present their concept cars, visions and hand-finished automotive treasures. Everything that has rank and name in the tuning scene comes together here. Whether hoonigan and professional speedster Ken Block, the German tuning legend JP alias Jean-Pierre Krämer and Porsche punk Magnus Walker. Everyone gets inspiration at SEMA. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: With 3.5 million units sold worldwide, the Mercedes Sprinter is one of the most popular commercial vehicles. In the third generation it is more modern than ever. Thanks to numerous connectivity applications, it is intended to make fleet management easier. It is also equipped with car-level comfort and safety features. We test the Sprinter around Amsterdam. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In 2019, Porsche celebrated 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993 based on an existing original bodyshell - the unique "Project Gold". Also: the Q5 Sportback, Audi's mid-range SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Alfa Romeo's latest creation: The GTA version of the 147. The already pretty design of the 147 has been properly trimmed towards sportiness. Voluminous air inlets and outlets as well as bulbous wheel arches suit it very well. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: A gravel pit becomes a stunt laboratory: the stunt heroes from Action Concept test for their favorite production “Alarm for Cobra 11”. They send a motorcycle freestyle over a ramp and shoot themselves into the water with a specially built human catapult. They are also experimenting with a new system: This is designed to allow a prepared car to roll over several times in the sand at 70 km/h. Stuntwoman Tina takes over the job as driver! (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: One of Europe's leading manufacturers of luxury caravans and premium motorhomes has its headquarters in Jandelsbrunn, Lower Bavaria: the Knaus Tabbert company. It all started in the mid-50s. At that time, Alfred Tabbert built the “Ideal”, the first caravan in series production. The 'Margrave' follows in 1960. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Tonga is a constitutional monarchy. Peter Goldstern was already in the service of George Tupou the 5th's father. He is now one of the king's closest confidants and has received several awards. Only he is allowed and can fly the royal machine. That's why, even at the age of 70, he still takes the controls and drives the boss, including his dog on board, across the island archipelago. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: A great rattling in your ears is what you know about motorcycling. But the future could look or sound different, and quietly. Is this still real motorcycling or does the electric drive completely rob you of the emotion? To find out, we test the latest models from Can-Am, Pulse and Origin, and visit the first European festival for electric motorcycles in Berlin. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world, a synonym for comfort and opulence and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: the Mercedes S-Class. But why is that so? What makes this vehicle so special and sets it apart from all others? We drive all model series, from the 450 SEL 6.9 to the current S 580 e, and explore the fascination of each model. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Chief Constable Aimo Rautianen from the Finnish town of Kuusankoski, which has a population of 22,000, goes on a mug hunt with a very special company car: a '76 Trabant L 601. It's not the only automotive curiosity from Finland. Timo Ukkonen is a talented hobbyist and turned his 1963 Skoda Octavia sedan into an original pickup. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most exciting cars in the world and arouse more desire than any other vehicle, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls Royce. With their extraordinary design and powerful engines, coupes arouse more emotions than any other car; they are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction. Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking dream coupes in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Sven Bössow are taking part in the Black Forest Winter Challenge, organized by the Hotel Ritter in Durbach, which is well-known among classic car lovers. For this occasion, Martin and Sven drive a Porsche 924 S from 1987. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It looks like a Ferrari, but comes from the Lower Bavarian province: the Glas GT. Uwe Gusen is one of the few who are still interested in the Glas brand - because it is racing at full speed into oblivion. If you want to buy one, you should hurry up and know your way around. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: For the joy of driving: That's what BMW, one of the most successful automobile companies in the world, stands for. The decidedly sporty automobiles and motorcycles from Bayrisch Motorenwerke AG are equally successful with customers and in racing. But the former aircraft engine manufacturer's entry into automobile production threatened to fail early on. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: The recipe for a successful car these days usually consists of: SUV shape and electric drive. The Avenger is Jeep's new smallest car in its lineup. The winner of the Car of the Year Award will go on a 250 kilometer road trip through Germany. The Cupra Tavascan is also the brand's first electric SUV. Can he set himself apart from his VW Group brothers? (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Mitsubishi Lancer began its career in the World Rally Championship in 1993 as the Evolution I. Off the road he shows what he can do and with great success. In 1996, Tommi Mäkinen achieved five World Championship race victories with the EVO III and won the title. But the success story doesn't end there. The Subaru WRX Sti is also extremely successful in rallying. What's interesting is that the two Japanese are so similar that they have been compared for model generations. Motorvision introduces the two opponents! (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: The ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season (channel info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the fastest art collection in the world: Designed by Andy Warhol, Roy Liechtenstein, Frank Stella and Jeff Koons, the world's most famous artists, BMW has been launching the racing art objects at Le Mans for many years. Whether it's the BMW M1, the Le Mans prototype or the M3 GT2, the BMW Art Cars are the most extraordinary cars in the history of Le Mans. At the helm of the world's fastest works of art are the world's fastest pilots, Hans-Joachim Stuck, Manfred Winkelhock and Andy Priaulx. Car History shows the history of the BMW Art Cars at Le Mans, with many original sounds from Jeff Koons, Frank Stella, Hans Stuck and Andy Priaulx. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Half a century of Ferrari. Rearview Mirror gets to the bottom of the Ferrari myth and takes a closer look at the red racers from Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: JoAnne squirms in Duncan's grasp; Lili needs these diagnoses by yesterday; the press is on to a scandal; Bardolph's triggered; Xander gets the joke; Orson has his heart stolen by someone with practice; Gary's Pippin is - it's too awful to say.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Wildfires hit the Valley, poisoning everything: marriages, neuro-psych evals, cheeseburgers, fifth homes; when someone poops in a hat, one A.I. friend to teens might just be the hero we've been waiting for; there's bad news about Linus Po.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Toxic masculinity makes a comeback in Martin's spine, Orson's gut, Duncan's shins; but the feminine side is strong: Sorrel's tincture, Lili's mud, JoJo's bridge; Anushka holds Duncan's feet to the fire as an atomic reaction sweeps through Las Altas.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: HyperG's salvation is close, but there's danger to Duncan; Lili has a secret; JoAnne hopes garlic can save her; Anushka finds gold at the end of the slide, but a witness to Easter Island threatens to destroy her; Beatrice cuts a deal with the Tang.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: JoAnne trusts Sheldon to do her dirty work. Ruffery is shattered; Duncan can't escape Hamish's legacy of flashy machinations; Tess discovers Orson's dark secret; Chekhov's gun might go off; Lili hits upon the greatest metaphor ever.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Is Xander a hero or a villain?; Duncan is ready to disrupt with P.I.N.A.T.A.; JoAnne contends with the consequences of her counsel; Anushka takes the lead and Martin has a decision to make; Gary gets to the root of Orson's strange behaviour.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Atwater, Ohio
programme.desc: In this true-crime story, cold-case investigators looking into a double murder elicit a series of confessions from a group of teens; years later, the teens recant their statements; aggressive tactics may have sent an innocent man to death row.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Turlock, California
programme.desc: A criminal defense attorney known for uncovering corruption finds himself on trial; accused of a complex murder-for-hire plot, along with eight others, he fights to clear his name and show the holes in the state's case.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Royse City, Texas
programme.desc: A couple are found brutally murdered in their home; investigators learn that the last person to see them alive had secrets of his own; some question whether prejudice led police to arrest the wrong man.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Edgewater, Florida
programme.desc: A dentist is killed by a masked gunman; the media reports salacious details as investigators uncover a sinister plot led by the dentist's wife and stepson, but a private investigator shares a startling alternate theory.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Adel, Georgia
programme.desc: The town of Adel, Ga., is rocked by a brutal robbery homicide, and locals quickly point to an outsider as the killer; over 20 years later, new evidence raises the startling question if an innocent man is serving life for another man's crime.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Sauquoit, New York
programme.desc: When a beloved chiropractor in Sauquoit, N.Y., dies suddenly under strange circumstances, investigators discover she's been murdered with a rare poison; the killer could only be someone she knew closely, and the case divides the town.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: St. Augustine, Florida
programme.desc: A young woman in St. Augustine, Fla., with everything to live for is found shot to death with the gun belonging to her boyfriend, a deputy sheriff; he says it was suicide, but her family believes it was murder.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Cookeville, Tennessee
programme.desc: When an immigrant couple who settled in the Tennessee town of Cookeville is executed in their sleep and their house set on fire, investigators identify a suspect with motive; in their rush to make an arrest, they may have gotten the wrong man.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Shelbyville, Kentucky
programme.desc: In rural Shelbyville, Ky., a body is found in the river; years go by until the police catch the killer, but some in town question if the suspect is even capable of committing the crime.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Rockville/Ellington, Connecticut
programme.desc: When a 22-year-old dancer goes missing, the men of the neighboring town who frequented the club she worked at become the suspect pool; wealth and status may protect a killer; a determined police officer works the case.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Dallas, Ga
programme.desc: In this true-crime story, after a woman is found shot in her bathroom, officials launch a death investigation to determine if it was suicide -- as her husband claimed -- or murder; years later, the case remains open, and the town still has questions.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Pocomoke City, Md
programme.desc: In this true-crime story, a young single mother disappears without a trace; an investigation suggests she abandoned her children, while her family spends years proving she was murdered and finding her killers.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Angier, N.C
programme.desc: In this true crime story, a man claims he shot his daughter's estranged husband, Christian Griggs, in self-defense -- but after investigators close the case, Christian's family discovers evidence that the killing was not justified.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Iaeger, W.Va
programme.desc: In this true-crime story, a beloved town doctor perishes in a deadly house fire -- which investigators conclude was arson; but after securing a murder conviction, the prosecutor doubts his own evidence and joins the fight to free an innocent man.
