programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Cookeville, Tennessee
programme.desc: When an immigrant couple who settled in the Tennessee town of Cookeville is executed in their sleep and their house set on fire, investigators identify a suspect with motive; in their rush to make an arrest, they may have gotten the wrong man.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Shelbyville, Kentucky
programme.desc: In rural Shelbyville, Ky., a body is found in the river; years go by until the police catch the killer, but some in town question if the suspect is even capable of committing the crime.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Rockville/Ellington, Connecticut
programme.desc: When a 22-year-old dancer goes missing, the men of the neighboring town who frequented the club she worked at become the suspect pool; wealth and status may protect a killer; a determined police officer works the case.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Dallas, Ga
programme.desc: In this true-crime story, after a woman is found shot in her bathroom, officials launch a death investigation to determine if it was suicide -- as her husband claimed -- or murder; years later, the case remains open, and the town still has questions.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Pocomoke City, Md
programme.desc: In this true-crime story, a young single mother disappears without a trace; an investigation suggests she abandoned her children, while her family spends years proving she was murdered and finding her killers.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Angier, N.C
programme.desc: In this true crime story, a man claims he shot his daughter's estranged husband, Christian Griggs, in self-defense -- but after investigators close the case, Christian's family discovers evidence that the killing was not justified.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Iaeger, W.Va
programme.desc: In this true-crime story, a beloved town doctor perishes in a deadly house fire -- which investigators conclude was arson; but after securing a murder conviction, the prosecutor doubts his own evidence and joins the fight to free an innocent man.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Atwater, Ohio
programme.desc: In this true-crime story, cold-case investigators looking into a double murder elicit a series of confessions from a group of teens; years later, the teens recant their statements; aggressive tactics may have sent an innocent man to death row.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Turlock, California
programme.desc: A criminal defense attorney known for uncovering corruption finds himself on trial; accused of a complex murder-for-hire plot, along with eight others, he fights to clear his name and show the holes in the state's case.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Royse City, Texas
programme.desc: A couple are found brutally murdered in their home; investigators learn that the last person to see them alive had secrets of his own; some question whether prejudice led police to arrest the wrong man.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Edgewater, Florida
programme.desc: A dentist is killed by a masked gunman; the media reports salacious details as investigators uncover a sinister plot led by the dentist's wife and stepson, but a private investigator shares a startling alternate theory.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Adel, Georgia
programme.desc: The town of Adel, Ga., is rocked by a brutal robbery homicide, and locals quickly point to an outsider as the killer; over 20 years later, new evidence raises the startling question if an innocent man is serving life for another man's crime.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn, Chee and Manuelito descend on the hiding place of the Buffalo Society, only to be confronted with hard decisions that could change the outcome of the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: Another total cancellation of the race day on the Isle of Man due to the weather, but instead we had the opportunity to talk in more detail with the Crowe brothers and Davey Todd and take a look back at the most spectacular races of the week.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: With the first Supersport race shortened to 3 laps, the question was whether Hicky could once again demonstrate his dominance from the Superbike race, whether Lee Johnston could repeat his success from last year or whether Michael Dunlup would live up to his role as favorite here. It was a hot fight.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race.

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2025
programme.desc: The TER is a European rally championship for modern rally vehicles.

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: E4 — Episode 2This time the show features the most exclusive and rare vehicles in the automotive world. Included are the Pagani, Huayra BC, the Rimac Concept One as well as the Lamborghini Huracán O.CT and the Arden Jaguar F-Type.

programme.title: 4x4 - Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: S3 E69 — Pick-up tuningPick-ups are becoming increasingly popular. The Toyota Hilux and the VW Amarok are being tested. The specialists at Delta 4x4 have given the Amarok a sturdy exterior. A modified Hilux by Alexander Wohlfarth is also shown.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E11 — Episode 112019 celebrated Porsche 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993, the unique Project Gold, based on an existing original bodyshell.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S2 E5 — Novitech AlfaTuning is a way of life for many car fans: the search for ever more horsepower, better sound and exceptional design. The show takes a look behind the scenes of well-known, renowned and private tuning companies.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Drift, Fly & FirePaul must slide under an exploding vehicle while Anna is catapulted into the air.

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: S2 E8 — Episode 21This episode features a drift racer in the desert and a monster truck that destroys itself.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: S2 E4 — MaybachMaybach is one of the finest car manufacturers in Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. It is an outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: S1 E11 — Episode 11Everything that has two, four or more wheels will soon be tested again in Garching near Munich.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: S1 E22 — New Classic Big BikesClassic motorcycles are back in style. Honda is also reflecting on its great tradition and with the CB 1100 EX has revived a big bike that could have ridden on our streets in the flashy seventies.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 E230 — Porsche 911 Speed ​​DatingAll 27 variants of the Porsche 911 are shown and their features are presented in detail. During a test and road trip through the Black Forest and the Palatinate, the presenter finally chooses his favorite 911 model.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: S12 — Tenerife and La Gomera EXPERIENCE 2023, Part 1The magazine for motorcycle fans reports on biker clubs, tours, meetings and events.

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Episode 10Both the BMW CS and the Mercedes SLC are among the best vehicles in the world. Two tuners have ventured into them and are getting even more out of the power packages. The Lancia Delta Integrale is also being tested.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: S2 E30 — Episode 30We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the curve. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: S2 E4 — US Muscle CarsThe fastest electric and hybrid cars in the world are both environmentally friendly and extravagant. They are introduced in the show. Cars from the Tesla, McLaren P1, Ferrari La Ferrari and Renovo Coupe brands are included.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S1 E18 — IsettaPrince Leopold of Bavaria owns two cars that couldn't be more opposite: the BMW Isetta and the BMW Z8. The BMW Isetta is one of the strangest and most successful small cars of the 1950s. The BMW Z8 is still a dream car today.

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: S2 E15 — Episode 15This magazine deals with various off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. It provides information about off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. The vehicles are presented and their qualities are examined in more detail.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 E22 — Citroen - France's Cult Cars(Citroen - France's Cult Cars)Citroën has celebrated the joy of extravagance right from the start. The Traction Avant model is a milestone in automotive history. The 2CV, also known as the 'Duck', is the most charming vehicle and a cult vehicle for many.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E64 — Refreshing FutureThis documentary presents the development of sustainability in the automotive industry. The latest research and environmentally friendly concepts at the car shows are presented and various aspects are taken into account.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E21 — Everything New! On the occasion of the Porsche 911 anniversary, we take a look at the history of the cult model. It's also about the world's first series-produced plug-in hybrid with a diesel engine, the Volvo V60, and safety in the automotive world.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: S2 E18 — Schuberth HelmetsMotorcycling can be a hobby, or a sport with an adrenaline rush, but it also carries risks. The fact that the number of deaths in motorcycle accidents in Germany is falling is due, among other things, to the constant improvement of crash helmets. The helmet manufacturer Schuberth in Magdeburg plays a large part in these life-saving developments. Around 350 employees manufacture all kinds of protective helmets here.

Does it have enough power to throw the motorcycle quickly and sufficiently far into the air.

They are also experimenting with a new system: This is designed to allow a prepared car to roll over several times in the sand at 70 km/h. Stuntwoman Tina takes over the job as driver.
